min_entry_age: No Capping / Any Room — built-in base cover allows any room category without extra charges. Optional Room Rent Modification available to restrict to Single Private AC Room, Shared Room, or General Ward.

Optional Operational Items (consultations) cover available. Standard outpatient doctor consultations and pharmacy not covered in base plan.

premium_min_20_35: Pan-India Network — 14,000+ network hospitals across India with strong Tier-2 and Tier-3 city presence. In-house claims team (no TPA).
premium_min_36_50: 50% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a maximum of 100%. AI-driven face scan for vitals (heart rate, SpO2, respiration rate) up to 2 times per month. Star Wellness Program offering up to 20% renewal premium discount via reward points. E-Domestic and E-International Second Medical Opinion available.
premium_mapping_note: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured (over and above the Sum Insured).
